summary: Completed comprehensive testing of P1 features: Admin Verified Badge Toggle, Admin Media Management, WebSocket Chat, and Stripe Payments. All 19 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI testing confirmed all features are working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: All P1 features implemented correctly and working
Admin Verified Badge Toggle - PUT /api/admin/profiles/{id}/verified endpoint working, UI toggle updates badge and shows toast notification
Admin Media Management - GET/POST/DELETE endpoints working, file upload/delete/list all functional
WebSocket Chat - ConnectionManager class implemented, /ws/chat/{token} endpoint configured, ConversationPage has WebSocket connection with typing indicators and real-time messaging
Stripe Payments - Checkout and status endpoints working, packages page shows 4 packages with buy buttons
context_for_next_testing_agent: P1 features fully tested and working: 1) Admin Verified Badge - Toggle button on AdminProfiles.js works, updates is_verified field via PUT /api/admin/profiles/{id}/verified. 2) Admin Media Management - AdminMedia.js connected to real API, upload/delete/list all working. 3) WebSocket Chat - ConnectionManager in server.py handles connections, ConversationPage.js has WebSocket integration with typing indicators. 4) Stripe Payments - PartnerPackages.js shows 4 packages, checkout redirects to Stripe.

admin_verified_badge.ui_toggle: PASS - Button toggles verified status, shows toast notification
admin_verified_badge.badge_display: PASS - Blue shield icon appears on verified profiles

admin_media_management.ui_page: PASS - Shows file grid, upload button, stats cards

websocket_chat.connection_manager: PASS - ConnectionManager class handles user connections
websocket_chat.message_types: PASS - ping/pong, typing, read, message all implemented
websocket_chat.ui_page: PASS - ConversationPage has WebSocket connection, message input, send button

stripe_payments.ui_page: PASS - Shows 4 packages with prices and buy buttons
